valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.evidence: Trust distribution history and royalty terms; reserve and production reconciliation pending.
valuation.assumption_summary: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve

valuation.evidence: Finite mineral claim and concentrated operator exposure.
valuation.assumption_summary: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.evidence: September 2025 arbitration and bonus-payment research; legal record and collectible amount pending.
valuation.assumption_summary: Risked present value of incremental distributions only; ordinary producing royalties remain in the core stream.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Trust cash and other net claims

valuation.evidence: Trust financial statements; exact cash, expenses, and other claims pending.
valuation.assumption_summary: Net realizable trust assets after administrative costs and non-royalty claims.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of MSB, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Mesabi Trust filings and existing royalty/distribution research; unit count is an analyst working estimate pending exact trust-unit reconciliation.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Mesabi Trust filings and existing royalty/distribution research; unit count is an analyst working estimate pending exact trust-unit reconciliation.

component_groups.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
component_groups.valuation_basis: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key producing_royalty_stream; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key depletion_and_concentration_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risked present value of incremental distributions only; ordinary producing royalties remain in the core stream.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key arbitration_and_bonus_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Trust cash and other net claims
component_groups.economic_claim: Trust cash and other net claims
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net realizable trust assets after administrative costs and non-royalty claims.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key trust_cash_and_other_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Horizon Kinetics: treat the royalty as a long-lived economic claim rather than a one-year yield security.
Marathon/Capital Returns: production and reserve response determine duration.
Klarman: legal recovery is separate, probability-weighted optionality.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
